commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=03046938a310c232ca193b0fdfddf62cb4557623)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps `JSON.parse` in OpenRouter music SSE line parsing and skips malformed `data:` frames by returning `false`.

PR surface: Source +6. Total +6 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence unit reproduction path: stream a valid audio chunk, then a malformed `data:` line, then `[DONE]`, and the PR branch can still return a non-empty result. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor revision and real behavior proof; the remaining blocker is not safe to route as an automated repair marker because contributor-side proof is required.

target.title: fix(openrouter): guard music generation SSE JSON.parse against malformed frames
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/openrouter/music-generation-provider.ts:128` calls `JSON.parse(data)` on raw SSE `data:` frames without try/catch. A malformed frame from the OpenRouter audio streaming endpoint causes an unhandled `SyntaxError` that crashes the music generation stream.

## Changes

- `extensions/openrouter/music-generation-provider.ts`: wrap `JSON.parse(data)` in try/catch → `return false` on failure (skip malformed frame, stream continues)

**Scope**: `processOpenRouterSseLine` SSE frame parsing only (1 line). The function already returns `false` for unrecognized data — malformed JSON now follows the same skip path.

Label: bugfix | merge-risk: 🟢 minimal | AI-assisted

## Evidence

### Existing SSE streaming tests continue to pass

The test suite already exercises SSE audio streaming via `generateMusic()`:

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/openrouter/music-generation-provider.test.ts

 ✓ streams OpenRouter audio chunks into a generated music asset
 ✓ releases OpenRouter audio stream readers after completion
 ✓ times out stalled OpenRouter audio streams after headers
 ✓ caps oversized OpenRouter music stream timeouts
 ✓ rejects OpenRouter streams that end before completion
 ... (all existing tests pass)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
```

### Before/after

```
// Before
const audio = readDeltaAudio(JSON.parse(data));  // 💥 SyntaxError → stream crash

// After
let parsedData: unknown;
try { parsedData = JSON.parse(data); } catch { return false; }  // skip frame
const audio = readDeltaAudio(parsedData);
```
target.author: lsr911
